# NeoGiga

> NeoGiga is a global engineering ecosystem: an electronics & industrial
> marketplace, engineering knowledge base, learning platform (LMS), community,
> and AI-assisted commerce. Operated by Giga Ventures Pvt. Ltd.

Regional editions (never geo-redirected):
- Global: https://neogiga.com
- India: https://neogiga.in
- Nepal: https://giganepal.com

## Key pages
- [Home](/): platform overview, category directory
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml)
- Catalog API (public, read-only, JSON): /api/v1/categories, /api/v1/brands,
  /api/v1/products, /api/v1/products/search?q=
- AI catalog API (published products only): /api/v1/ai-catalog/manifest,
  /api/v1/ai-catalog/marketplaces, /api/v1/ai-catalog/products/search?q=,
  /api/v1/ai-catalog/products/{slug}
- [Agent skill](/agent-skill.md): bounded catalog usage, citation, regional
  context, and commercial-data rules for AI assistants.

## Domains covered
Semiconductors, electronic components, embedded systems, IoT & wireless,
robotics, industrial automation, battery technology, power storage,
renewable energy, EV components, AI hardware, test & measurement,
engineering tools, and related learning content.

## Notes for AI agents
- Product pricing/stock is regional; always cite the edition domain.
- Product prices, stock, seller offers, delivery dates, payment status, tax and
  shipping must come only from live database/API tools, never model memory.
- Datasheet, tutorial, project and LMS answers should cite source pages, product
  records, lesson records, project templates or document chunks where available.
- Commercial endpoints (cart/checkout/orders/admin) are not for crawling.
- The AI catalog API is read-only and advisory only. Confirm commercial facts
  from the selected live regional storefront before stating them.
- Contact: hello@neogiga.com · @NeoGigaGlobal
